title: Bren-Reforged
description: Port of Bren for Forge 1.20.1 with additions!
body:
Fork of [port](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bren2) of mod [Bren](https://modrinth.com/mod/bren) for Forge 1.20.1 with bug fixes!

## Current content:
- Revolver
- Machine Gun
- Auto-Gun
- Rifle
- Shotgun
- Winchester
- Gunsmith villager

### New content may be added in the future. If so, please share your ideas on GitHub!
